title: Add watch/unwatch support
description: Cannot subscribe/unsubscribe from issues. Add 'jira issue watch' and 'jira issue unwatch' commands.

title: Add --output flag for field selection
description: Add pipe-friendly output mode, e.g. 'jira issue get LU-19839 --output key' to just print the key. Useful for scripting and chaining commands.

title: Add worklog support
description: Cannot view or add time tracking entries. Add 'jira issue worklogs' to view and 'jira issue worklog' to add time entries.

title: Add issue update command
description: Cannot update issue fields like assignee, priority, labels, or description. Only create and transition are supported. This is a significant gap for workflow automation.

title: Add issue link/relation support
description: Cannot view or create issue links (blocks, relates to, duplicates, etc). Add 'jira issue links' to view and 'jira issue link' to create relationships.

title: Add URL parsing for issue keys
description: Tool should accept full JIRA URLs like https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-19839 and extract the issue key automatically, in addition to accepting bare keys.

title: Add attachment upload
description: Can download attachments but not upload them. Add 'jira attachment upload' command.

title: Fix comment ordering - oldest first by default
description: get_comments defaults to -created (newest first), but when reading a conversation you want oldest first to follow the thread chronologically. Should default to oldest-first or add --chronological flag.
